title: 18" foil helium balloon holographic happy birthday party decs (Blue, 50th)
features: Dazzling Holographic Effect: More than just shiny, the holographic finish creates a dynamic, multi-dimensional shimmer that catches the light from every angle. This adds a real "wow" factor to any birthday celebration and makes the balloon a standout decoration.

Generous 18-Inch Size: This isn't a small, easily overlooked balloon. The 18-inch size ensures it becomes a focal point, commanding attention and adding a festive presence to the party atmosphere. It's perfect for photo backdrops and creating memorable moments.

Versatile Colour Options: Available in classic pink and bold blue, these colour choices cater to a variety of preferences and party themes. Whether you're celebrating a little princess or a cool dude, you can find the perfect colour to match.

Personalized Age Celebration: Make their milestone birthday extra special by choosing the exact age they're celebrating. This personalized touch shows you care and makes the balloon a truly unique decoration. (Clearly display the available age range in your listing.)

Durable and Long-Lasting: Crafted from high-quality foil material, this balloon is designed to hold its inflation for extended periods, allowing you to enjoy the decorations throughout the party and even beyond. This durability also makes it suitable for air filling and displaying as a static decoration in a child's room after the party.

Easy Inflation Options: Designed for convenience, the balloon can be easily inflated with either helium for a floating effect or regular air for a static display. (Mention that helium is recommended for the full effect and where it can typically be purchased.)

Complete Kit for Hassle-Free Decorating: This isn't just a balloon; it's a complete decorating solution! The included matching curling ribbon makes it easy to tie the balloon to furniture or create balloon bouquets, while the weight box ensures it stays anchored and prevents it from floating away. This saves you time and effort in sourcing additional supplies.
description: Product description 18" Holographic Happy Birthday Foil Balloon - Pink or Blue - Various Ages Available - with Ribbon & Weight! Make their birthday sparkle with this dazzling holographic balloon kit! Celebrate a special birthday with this eye-catching 18" holographic foil balloon. Available in both pink and blue, this balloon kit is the perfect decoration to add a touch of shimmer and shine to any birthday party. Choose the age number you need to make their day extra special! Each pack contains ONE balloon in your chosen colour (pink or blue) and age number, PLUS a matching curling ribbon and a weight box. Please select your desired colour and age from the drop-down menus. Key Features: Eye-Catching Holographic Design: The stunning holographic finish reflects light beautifully, creating a vibrant and festive atmosphere. 18-Inch Size: This large balloon makes a statement and is sure to be noticed by everyone at the party. Choice of Pink or Blue: Select the perfect colour to suit the birthday person's preferences or the party theme. Various Age Numbers Available: Choose the specific number to celebrate their milestone birthday. (Please see the drop-down menu for available numbers.) High-Quality Foil Material: Durable and long-lasting, this balloon can be filled with helium to float or air to be displayed as a static decoration. Easy to Inflate: Designed for easy inflation with helium or air. (Helium inflation recommended for floating effect.) Complete Kit: Each pack includes the balloon, a matching curling ribbon, and a weight box to keep your balloon afloat. Perfect for: Birthday parties of all ages Adding a touch of sparkle to birthday decorations Creating a focal point for photos Gifting to the birthday person Specifications: Size: 18 inches Material: Foil Colour: Pink or Blue (Select from drop-down menu) Design: Holographic Happy Birthday with Age Number Quantity: 1 balloon per pack Includes: 1 Balloon, 1 Curling Ribbon (matching colour), 1 Weight Box Please Note: Balloons are supplied flat and require inflation. Helium is not included. You can purchase helium from most party supply stores. Adult supervision is recommended for children under 8 years old when using balloons. Add a touch of magic to their birthday celebrations! Order your holographic birthday balloon kit today! Safety Warning Keep away from naked flames
